description:
Meets OEM Standards: OE Numbers: 515096, 10393171, 25918329. Our 1-pack wheel bearing hub assembly is designed for front wheels

Vehicle Fitment: This wheel hub assembly is tailored for specific models, compatible with 2007-2013 Chevy Silverado 1500 4WD, GMC Sierra 1500, and Cadillac vehicles. Note: Please check the fitment chart on the page to confirm compatibility with your car

ABS Sensor Equipped: The wheel hub includes a precision ABS sensor to monitor wheel speed. It delivers accurate data to the ABS system and enhances braking performance with real-time anti-lock control

Industrial-Grade Steel Bearing: The wheel bearing is pre-lubricated to minimize friction and wear, and reduce noise. It can withstand multi-directional loads during steering, ensuring reliable handling
